filename.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Relative paths (e.g., `./database.db` or `data/db.sqlite`) are resolved against the workspace root containing the connection file. Absolute paths (e.g., `C:\data\db.sqlite` or `/var/db/data.sqlite`) are used as-is. Use `:memory:` to create an in-memory database.

mode.description: File access mode. Defaults to READ_WRITE_CREATE. Use 0 for READ_ONLY, 1 for READ_WRITE, and 2 for READ_WRITE_CREATE.
